display_text: Enchanted Mango, Cost: 65: Consumable item that can be instantly eaten to restore 100 mana, or held for continuous health regeneration. Provides +0.4 HP regen while held. Can be used on nearby allied heroes. Stats: Charges: 1, Mana Restore: 100, HP Regen: +0.4.
search_text: mango, mana restore item, instant mana, consumable mana, early game mana, laning sustain, mana consumable, hp regen item, heal regeneration, Enchanted Mango

display_text: Enchanted Mango, Cost: 65: Critical laning consumable for heroes with high-impact, high-mana-cost spells. Provides an emergency mana pool for a crucial cast, preventing enemies from assuming you are out of mana. Also supplies steady HP regen to survive harass while held.
search_text: enchanted mango laning, early mana sustain, emergency mana, bait item, surprise spell, mana sustain item, lane harass survival, hp regen lane, Enchanted Mango

display_text: Enchanted Mango, Cost: 65: Use to enable aggressive spellcasting early in lane to secure kills or lane dominance. Save for a surprise kill threat when enemy assumes you lack mana. Can be given to mid laner as shared sustain, amplifying lane pressure and team resources.
